fallback: No local cangjie skill was available in this runtime. The cangjie search returned no matching skill files, so this entry was distilled using book2skill and skill-creator-style guidance.
metadataNotes: The assigned Microsoft Learn source snapshot is a 404 page for an intended transactional outbox pattern URL, so source content was incomplete. Supplemented the broader theory metadata for Transaction Processing: Concepts and Techniques by Jim Gray and Andreas Reuter, Morgan Kaufmann, 1992, plus operational transaction-processing concepts needed for auto-orchestrator design: ACID boundaries, isolation, recovery, idempotency, transactional outbox/inbox, sagas, leases/fencing, retries, and compensation.
